page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.se1ne.14xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance within the ecs.se1ne family, running on the KVM hypervisor. It features 56 dedicated physical cores with 56 vCPUs, indicating a configuration of one thread per core. The instance is equipped with 480.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.57 GB per core. There is no local storage bundled with this instance, and it does not include any GPUs. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Given the high memory density relative to the processing cores, this instance is designed for memory-intensive workloads. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures that processing resources are not shared with other tenants, providing predictable performance. The lack of local storage requires the attachment of external cloud storage volumes for persistent data. This hardware profile is suited for large-scale databases, in-memory caching systems, enterprise applications, and memory-heavy data processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.se1ne.14xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 56 dedicated physical cores and 56 vCPUs, operating with a single thread per core to deliver predictable compute performance. The system is configured with 480.0 GB of RAM, providing a high resource density of 8.57 GB of memory per core. This instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached volumes. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. The high memory-to-CPU ratio and dedicated core allocation make this server type suitable for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, including large-scale databases, in-memory caching, and complex data processing tasks that do not require local disk storage or GPU acceleration.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.se1ne.14xlarge is a KVM-based, memory-optimized instance featuring 56 dedicated vCPUs, 480.0 GB of RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for memory-intensive workloads.

tagline: A dedicated memory-optimized instance featuring fifty-six cores and substantial RAM for demanding enterprise databases and in-memory caching workloads.
